description: Display categories in TUI hierarchy: Currently TUI (pkg/tui/) shows flat list of projects. Config now has categories []string field that defines available categories and their display order. Restructure TUI to show three-level hierarchy: Category > Project > Worktree. Categories appear in order defined by config.categories. Projects with a category field are grouped under their category. Projects without category field appear in 'Uncategorized' group at bottom. Each category is collapsible (like current project nodes). Keyboard navigation (up/down) moves through all three levels. Opening (Enter/o) only works on worktree nodes. Creating worktree (n) and adding project (a) work when project node selected. Category nodes display project count. Visual indicators: Category nodes use different style than projects (see projectStyle as reference). Update buildItems() in model.go to build three-level item list respecting category grouping. Store category in Item struct. Add ItemTypeCategory. Handle expand/collapse for category nodes.
acceptance_criteria: TUI displays categories as top-level nodes in config.categories order
Projects are grouped under their assigned category
Projects without category appear under 'Uncategorized' at bottom
Category nodes show project count like '▸ work (3)'
Up/down navigation works across all three levels (category/project/worktree)
Enter/o on worktree opens VS Code, no action on category nodes
Creating worktree (n) works when project node selected
Visual distinction between category and project nodes (different color/style)
